item.title: 伊朗袭击事件后，日本、韩国股市从市场暴跌中反弹
item.description: 受美国和以色列对伊朗发动袭击引发的市场暴跌影响，日本和韩国股市出现反弹，强劲的美国经济数据提振了市场情绪。【原文：Japanese and South Korean stocks rebounded from a market rout triggered by the US-Israeli attack on Iran, as strong US economic data boosted sentiment.】

item.title: 马来西亚经济韧性增强，加息预期升温
item.description: 固定收益投资者正为马来西亚利率上升布局，这与市场普遍预期利率将维持不变的预测相悖——该国经济增速已逼近该地区最快水平。【原文：Fixed-income investors are positioning for higher interest rates in Malaysia, defying forecasts for a hold as the economy grows at nearly the fastest pace in the region.】

item.title: 中国将财政赤字目标维持在创纪录高位以刺激经济
item.description: 中国将持续实施财政刺激政策以支持经济增长，因国内挑战持续困扰经济，且地缘政治风险不断上升。【原文：China will keep fiscal stimulus flowing to support growth as domestic challenges stalk the economy with geopolitical risks on the rise.】

item.title: 韩国股市反弹，芯片制造商股价上涨，此前遭遇创纪录抛售
item.description: 韩国股市在创纪录单日暴跌后反弹，因恐慌抛售重创的市场中，抄底者重新入场。【原文：South Korean equities bounced back after their biggest one-day slump on record, as bargain hunters stepped back into a market battered by panic selling.】

item.title: 中国设定1991年以来最低增长目标，旧模式显露疲态
item.description: 中国设定三十多年来最保守的增长目标，这默认了支撑该国四十年快速崛起的经济模式正显露疲态。【原文：China set its most modest growth target in more than three decades, in a tacit acknowledgment that the model powering the country’s rapid rise for four decades is showing strains.】

item.title: 卡尼呼吁加拿大、澳大利亚引领中等强国集团
item.description: 加拿大总理马克·卡尼在澳大利亚议会表示，加拿大和澳大利亚应凭借其作为稳定、可信赖的民主国家的声誉，领导能够抵御美国、中国及其他大国主导地位的联盟。【原文：Canada and Australia should use their reputations as stable, trustworthy democracies to lead coalitions that can resist domination by the US, China and other great powers, Prime Minister Mark Carney told Australia’s Parliament.】

item.title: 中国科技股暴跌6000亿美元，人工智能成本或加剧跌势
item.description: 中国科技巨头股的持续抛售潮尚未显露缓解迹象，投资者担忧激烈竞争中不断攀升的支出。【原文：The ongoing selloff in China’s megacap technology stocks shows little sign of easing, as investors fret over spiraling spending amid heated competition.】

item.title: 韩国总统押注股市或将适得其反
item.description: 李在明在去年六月总统选举的胜利征途中，力推重整韩国股市作为家庭财富的新引擎——这项举措截至上周仍看似进展得极为顺利。【原文：Lee Jae Myung championed a revamped South Korean stock market as a new builder of household wealth on his road to victory in the presidential election last June – an initiative that looked to be going fantastically well as of last week.】

item.title: 金价上涨，因中东战争推升对避险资产的需求
item.description: 随着美元走软，且中东战争进入第六天仍无解决迹象，金价持续攀升。【原文：Gold pushed higher, after the dollar declined and the war in the Middle East entered a sixth day with no sign of resolution.】

item.title: 中国设定1991年以来最低经济增长目标
item.description: 天安门广场，3月5日。【原文：Tiananmen Square on March 5.】

item.title: 韩国罕见IPO后K银行上市首日遭遇暴跌阴云笼罩
item.description: 数字银行K Bank Co.即将登陆首尔证券交易所，进入这个正遭受史上最严重暴跌冲击的市场。【原文：Digital lender K Bank Co. is set to make its trading debut in Seoul, entering a market shaken by its worst crash in history.】

item.title: 马来西亚维持利率不变，中东战争引发新一轮不确定性
item.description: 马来西亚央行很可能维持借贷成本不变，在伊朗战争给全球经济带来新一轮不确定性之际保持谨慎。【原文：Malaysia’s central bank will likely stand pat on borrowing costs, exercising caution as the Iran war unleashes a fresh wave of uncertainty on the global economy.】

item.title: 欧洲央行行长温施表示，随着欧元在全球扮演更重要角色，其汇率可能走强
item.description: 欧洲央行理事会成员皮埃尔·温施表示，若欧洲大陆希望提升单一货币在全球的地位，欧洲央行必须为欧元走强做好准备。【原文：The European Central Bank must prepare for a stronger euro if the continent wants to boost the single currency’s global status, Governing Council member Pierre Wunsch said.】

item.title: 韩国股市有望反弹，美国通胀担忧缓解：市场综述
item.description: 亚洲股市周四开盘有望走高，此前一个交易日遭遇重挫。尽管伊朗战争不确定性推高油价，但美国股市因经济韧性数据缓解通胀担忧而攀升。【原文：Asian equities were set to open higher Thursday after heavy selling in the prior session. US stocks climbed as data showed economic resilience and eased inflation fears, even as the Iran war uncertainty increased oil prices further.】

item.title: 安东尼·布林肯多年来竭力避免与伊朗开战。如今他的言论或将终结这场战争。
item.description:
在今天的《重大观点》播客节目中，前国务卿安东尼·布林肯探讨了伊朗战争如何使美国陷入困境，以及可能促使特朗普总统走向停火的两大因素。【原文：

On today’s Big Take podcast, former Secretary of State Antony Blinken discusses how war in Iran leaves the US exposed and the two factors that could push President Trump towards a ceasefire.

】

item.title: Meta计划开发定制芯片以训练其人工智能模型
item.description: Meta Platforms公司首席财务官表示，该公司近期虽已与顶级芯片制造商达成重大合作协议，但仍致力于自主研发定制芯片，包括计划开发可训练未来人工智能模型的处理器。【原文：Meta Platforms Inc., which recently reached major deals with top chipmakers, still has ambitions for its own custom silicon, including plans to develop processors that can train future artificial intelligence models, the company’s chief financial officer said.】

item.title: 巴克莱称聘用人工智能专家可提升债券与股票表现
item.description: 据巴克莱银行称，今年在人工智能领域招聘更多专家的公司，其股票和债券表现优于大盘。【原文：Companies hiring more experts in artificial intelligence are seeing their stocks and bonds outperform this year, according to Barclays Plc.】

item.title: 全球能源冲击倒计时
item.description:
在《特朗普经济学》节目中，我们探讨了伊朗战争将对经济造成重大损害需要多长时间——以及谁可能从这场冲突中获益。【原文：

On Trumponomics, we discuss how long it would take for the Iran War to do major economic damage—and who might benefit from the conflict.

】

item.title: 加贝利敦促奈飞在与华纳对峙后进军索尼动漫领域
item.description: 在输掉对华纳兄弟探索公司的收购战后，网飞公司应考虑与索尼集团合作以强化其知识产权战略，因为流媒体竞争日益激烈。资产管理公司马里奥·加贝利在接受彭博电视采访时如是说。【原文：Netflix Inc., after losing the takeover battle for Warner Bros. Discovery Inc., should consider partnering with Sony Group Corp. to strengthen its intellectual property strategy as streaming competition intensifies, money manager Mario Gabelli said in a Bloomberg TV interview.】

item.title: 华尔街监管机构推进加密货币与预测市场计划
item.description: 华尔街主要监管机构正推进监管加密货币行业及蓬勃发展的预测市场的计划，新措施可能对更广泛的金融市场产生深远影响。【原文：Wall Street’s main regulators are advancing plans to oversee the crypto industry and surging prediction markets with new measures likely to be laced with longstanding implications for broader financial markets.】

item.title: 马杜罗秘密签署的油田合约引发美国官员关注
item.description: 据知情人士透露，委内瑞拉和美国正在审查数十份在被罢免的强人尼古拉斯·马杜罗执政期间签署的机密石油合同。【原文：Venezuela and the US are scrutinizing dozens of confidential oil contracts signed during the reign of ousted strongman Nicolas Maduro, according to people familiar with the situation.】

item.title: 博通发布乐观预测及回购计划，人工智能业务取得进展
item.description: 博通公司发布了稳健的销售预测，并宣布了一项价值高达100亿美元的股票回购计划，这表明其利用人工智能支出获取收益的战略正在取得成效。【原文：Broadcom Inc. delivered a solid sales forecast and announced a stock buyback plan worth as much as $10 billion, signaling that its push to capitalize on AI spending is paying off.】

item.title: 美亚间石油运输成本创历史新高，部分交易受挫
item.description: 从美国向亚洲运输原油的成本已创历史新高，尽管部分交易因运费飙升已开始告吹。【原文：It’s never been more expensive to ship crude from the US to Asia, though some deals are starting to fall through already with rates sky-high.】

item.title: 量子初创企业Pasqal将通过SPAC上市，估值达20亿美元
item.description: 帕斯卡控股公司同意与一家空白支票公司合并，该交易对合并后公司的估值为20亿美元（融资前），由此加入了越来越多选择通过上市载体实现公开上市的量子初创企业行列。【原文：Pasqal Holding SAS agreed to merge with a blank-check firm in a deal that values the combined company at $2 billion pre-money, joining the growing number of quantum startups choosing to go public through the listed vehicles.】

item.title: 据称Arcline将加入对英国航空航天公司Senior的收购战
item.description: 知情人士透露，Arcline投资管理公司正考虑收购Senior Plc，这可能引发对这家英国航空航天供应商的三方争夺战。【原文：Arcline Investment Management is weighing a takeover of Senior Plc, people familiar with the matter said, setting up a potential three-way tussle for the British aerospace supplier.】

item.title: 美国展现了终极的暴利特权
item.description: 例外主义的回归。【原文：The return of exceptionalism.】

item.title: 美国参议员就与受制裁实体有关联的公司施压情报部门
item.description: 由六名美国参议员组成的两党小组敦促英特尔公司提供更多关于其与ACM Research公司关系的细节。这家半导体设备制造商的子公司因2024年被列入国家安全黑名单，至今仍处于美国商务部的制裁名单中。【原文：A bipartisan group of six US senators pressed Intel Corp. for more information about its relationship with ACM Research Inc., a maker of semiconductor equipment whose subsidiaries remain on a Commerce Department blacklist, following a 2024 listing for national security reasons.】

item.title: 委内瑞拉关键石油枢纽在美方监督下出口量逼近七年高点
item.description: 委内瑞拉主要出口枢纽的原油出口量在3月份正飙升至多年高位，此时距离特朗普政府接管石油销售已过去三个月。【原文：Venezuelan crude exports from its main export hub are surging toward multi-year highs in March, three months into the Trump administration’s control of oil sales.】

item.title: 因担忧私募信贷风险，做空蓝猫的押注创历史新高
item.description: 投资者正加大对蓝猫资本公司的做空头寸，押注该股仍有下跌空间——尽管今年其市值已蒸发近三分之一。【原文：Investors are boosting short positions in Blue Owl Capital Inc., betting the stock has more room to fall despite wiping out nearly one-third of its value this year.】

item.title: 自由正为这只独立ETF带来回报
item.description:
七年前推出的新兴市场交易所交易基金FRDM突然开始攀升。

【原文：

Launched seven years ago, the emerging markets exchange-traded fund FRDM is suddenly climbing.

】
